Our Products

Herbal Remedies

Seven potent formulas targeting your most important health needs.

30 Caps
Antibacterial · Antiviral · Antifungal
Baktenon Capsule

Formulated for prevention and treatment of bacterial, viral and fungal infections. Also effective for genito-urinary tract infections and bladder control.

Bacterial Infections Viral Infections Fungal Infections UTI Relief Bladder Control
💊 3 caps Morning & Night
50 Caps
Blood · Metabolic · Vitality
Biogaad Capsule

Cleanses and enriches the blood. Beneficial for diabetes, hypertension, sickle-cell anaemia, fatigue, sexually transmitted diseases and libido problems.

Diabetes Hypertension Sickle Cell Blood Purifier Libido
💊 3 caps Morning & Night
30 Caps
Cardiovascular · Blood Pressure
Biotensus Capsule

A targeted herbal formula designed to support healthy blood pressure levels and cardiovascular function through natural plant-based phytocompounds.

Blood Pressure Heart Health Circulation Cardiovascular
💊 As directed
20 Caps
Sexual Health · Energy · Vitality
Biovig Capsule

An alternative herbal formula for sexual weakness, quick ejaculation, and as an energizer for both men and women. Powered by Sarsapar, Damiana and Ginseng.

Sexual Weakness Stamina Energy Boost Men & Women
💊 2 caps 1hr before
30 Caps
Diabetes Management
Glukogaad Capsule

An alternative herbal formula specifically developed for the treatment of Diabetes Type I and Type II, using Momordica charantia, Vernonia amygdalina and more.

Diabetes Type I Diabetes Type II Blood Sugar Metabolic Health
💊 3 caps Morning & Night
30 Caps
Digestive · Pile · Haemorrhoid
Pilogaad Capsule

A herbal remedy targeting piles, haemorrhoids and digestive tract issues. Supports healthy bowel function and provides soothing relief for internal discomfort.

Piles Relief Haemorrhoids Digestive Health Bowel Support
💊 As directed
300ml
UTI · Detox · Blood Purifier
Phyto Bitters

Clinically formulated for UTIs (Syphilis, Staphylococcus, Gonorrhea), Pile and Haemorrhoid. Stimulates digestive organs to detox, purifies the blood and is a powerful antioxidant.

UTI Treatment Blood Purifier Detox Antioxidant Pile & Haemorrhoid
🥄 3 tbsp twice daily

Our Story

About Bio Phytomedicine

🌿
Rooted in Nature. Built for Life.

Nature's Pharmacy,
Delivered to You

Bio Phytomedicine Ltd is a Nigerian herbal pharmaceutical company dedicated to harnessing the powerful healing properties of plants. Our products are manufactured by Bio Phytomedicine, combining traditional African phytomedicine wisdom with modern scientific formulation standards.

We believe that nature provides everything the human body needs to thrive. Our mission is to make high-quality, affordable herbal remedies accessible to every Nigerian household and beyond.

All our products are 100% herbal, free from synthetic additives, and manufactured in compliance with NAFDAC regulations.

📍 Head Office: 65b, Odaliki Street, Ebute-Meta West, Lagos

🏭 Manufacturer: 2, Odeyale Street, Off Olumide Street, Target Filling Station B-Stop, Fajol, Abeokuta, Ogun State

📞 Tel: 08055622573, 08033312120

✉️ phytomedicine4life@gmail.com · phytomedicine4life@yahoo.com
